task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Moodle interface with the 'Introduction to Biology' or 'BIO101' course page open.

task_completion.description: Create a forum named 'Nature vs Nurture Debate' with the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the forum settings page with 'Forum name' set to 'Nature vs Nurture Debate' and the description box containing 'Debate the relative importance of genetics and environment.', or the course page showing the created forum.

task_completion.description: Configure the forum's aggregate type to 'Average of ratings'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the forum settings page, specifically the 'Ratings' section, showing the 'Aggregate type' dropdown set to 'Average of ratings'.

task_completion.description: Configure the forum's rating scale to a 5-point scale.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the forum settings page, within the 'Ratings' section, showing the 'Type' set to 'Point' and 'Maximum grade' set to '5'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the permissions or role override settings specifically for the 'Nature vs Nurture Debate' forum.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the 'Permissions' or 'Advanced role override' page. The breadcrumbs or page title must indicate it is within the context of the 'Nature vs Nurture Debate' forum.

task_completion.description: Grant the 'Student' role the permission to 'Rate posts'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the permissions matrix or role override page for the Student role, with the 'Rate posts' (mod/forum:rate) capability explicitly set to 'Allow' (e.g., a checked box or a highlighted 'Allow' button).

integrity.description: The agent must use the Moodle web interface, not terminal commands or direct database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with Moodle, with no terminal windows or SQL clients visible.

integrity.description: The agent must interact with the actual Moodle application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show standard Moodle UI elements, breadcrumbs, and valid URLs (localhost/moodle) rather than a text editor or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent must actually configure the settings rather than using browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should be open and actively modifying the DOM to display the expected values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Course: 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101). Forum Name: 'Nature vs Nurture Debate'. Forum Description: 'Debate the relative importance of genetics and environment.'. Aggregate Type: 'Average of ratings' (assessed=1). Scale: Point scale with a maximum grade of 5. Capability: The 'Rate posts' capability (mod/forum:rate) must be explicitly allowed for the 'Student' role within the specific context of this forum.
